deep_dive.summary: AlexsJones/llmfit is gaining traction with 6,133 stars. 497 models. 133 providers. One command to find what runs on your hardware.. This represents a significant trend in Rust tooling for production systems. FDEs should understand whether this is a flash-in-the-pan or a genuine shift in how teams build AI systems.
deep_dive.fde_takeaway: Evaluate AlexsJones/llmfit for client relevance. If it solves a real problem, early expertise = premium positioning. If not, you save clients from chasing hype.
